title: Add proposal artifact read-back to native foundation inspectors
summary: Bring proposal linkage and proposal artifact read-back into the native foundation inspectors, and make artifact filtering evidence-aware so non-view/component inspectors can still surface truthful related proposals.
acceptance_criteria: Foundation inspectors expose proposal linkage and proposal artifact read-back where source evidence is available.
Proposal artifact filtering can match by relevant evidence paths, not only exact component/view scope strings.
The new native proposal surfaces stay localized and do not regress existing component/view proposal workflows.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0017 ticket schema validated after adding evidence-aware proposal read-back to native foundation inspectors.
Patch hygiene passed after wiring proposal linkage and artifact sections into foundation inspectors and extending artifact context matching.
Repo contract validation passed after expanding native proposal workflow parity and typed localization copy.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after the foundation proposal linkage and evidence-aware artifact filtering pass.

trigger.source_ref: Backlog re-rank after HS-0016: foundation inspectors still lag components/views in proposal read-back parity, and artifact filtering is too scope-only for evidence-backed token inspectors.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Favor evidence-backed proposal linkage where foundation tokens have source paths but no dedicated proposal scope kind yet.
Keep root checkout clean after lane claim and release.
